exploration_notes:
Identified the four major kubelet sig-node components:

1. **Pod Lifecycle Manager (PLEG)**: The Pod Lifecycle Event Generator lives in `pkg/kubelet/pleg/`. `pleg.go` defines the `PodLifecycleEventGenerator` interface and event types. `generic.go` implements `GenericPLEG` (polling-based), and `evented.go` implements `EventedPLEG` (event-driven via CRI). The higher-level pod lifecycle orchestration (SyncPod, KillPod) is in `pkg/kubelet/kuberuntime/kuberuntime_manager.go` (`kubeGenericRuntimeManag
